pericopes.pericopeTitle: THE BUILDING OF THE TEMPLE[SEE COMMENTARY ON 1 KINGS 6-7]

entries.author: St. Aphrahat
entries.title: THE POWER OF PRAYER.
entries.body: Asa prayed, and his prayer manifested great power: when Zerah the Indian [Ethiopian] went out against him with an army of one million with him, Asa then prayed, saying, By this shall your power be known, O our God, when you finish off a vast people by means of a small people. God heard his prayer and sent his angel to rout them. Thus the vast army was defeated by the power of Asa’s prayer. {fn:0}
